title: How Does the Sea?
poem_text:
How does the sea keep all its waves in line?
Why do the tides forget to cross the line?

Who taught the fish to swim in perfect rows?
Why do the shells hum lullabies nobody knows?

Where do the bubbles go when they pop at night?
Do they sneak in dreams and turn the dark to light?

How many raindrops fit inside a cloud?
Why does the thunder laugh so soft and loud?

Who counts the grains of sand before we sleep?
Do they whisper secrets only stars can keep?
cover_context: A child's hand dips into glowing ocean water at dusk, ripples swirling with tiny golden fish and floating bubbles.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, guitar and gentle beatbox, 111 BPM, dreamy and wondering, spacious, leaves room to think, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
